name: Gumbo Soup (Low Cal)
recipeIngredient: 4 tomatoes, fresh or 1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Cover and simmer for about 20 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
4. Serve 1 1/2 cups as approximately 35 calories per serving.
Note: Uncle Ben's Converted Rice holds its shape well during long cooking times. Any rice can be used if the soup is not reheated multiple times, but it typically isn't.
This thin soup can be thickened by adding shredded cabbage, chard, bok choy, or other greens. These additions are optional and add a few calories.
This recipe is a lighter alternative to traditional Cajun Gumbo for days when you want to cut back on calories without sacrificing flavor. It's versatile and can be customized with herbs or hot peppers. Store in the refrigerator for easy snacking.
